showReadOnlyProtection.name: show read-only protection
showReadOnlyProtection.description: Whether to show the read-only protection option in the developer mode
showReadOnlyProtection.description[zh_CN]: 是否在开发者模式中显示只读保护选项

bootWallpaperEnabled.name: edit boot wallpaper
bootWallpaperEnabled.description: Is the GRUB "boot menu" wallpaper editable?
bootWallpaperEnabled.description[zh_CN]: "启动菜单"grub背景图片可否编辑

bootGrubUserNameVisible.name: boot grub userName visible
bootGrubUserNameVisible.description: Whether to show the username in the verification password pop-up window of "Startup Menu Verification"
bootGrubUserNameVisible.description[zh_CN]: 是否在"启动菜单验证"的验证密码弹窗中显示用户名
